name: ScorZone Golf Center & Lounge
address: Tim Hortons Iceplex, 2700 Brighton Henrietta Town Line Rd, Rochester, NY 14623
about: ScorZone Golf Center & Lounge is a golf simulator venue located at the Tim Hortons Iceplex in Rochester, NY. The facility features top-of-the-line golf simulator technology with three bays equipped with Foresight FSX Play GCQuad and GS Pro simulators. It offers a comfortable lounge atmosphere and a putting green. The venue provides access to over 1,100 golf courses, league opportunities, and golf club fittings with Mizuno, Cleveland, and Srixon brands. Additional amenities include on-site food and drink options at the Chef's Bar & Grill located within the same complex.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight GCQuad and GS Pro simulator technology
On-site Chef's Bar & Grill for food and drinks
Golf club fittings with major brands
Comfortable lounge atmosphere and dedicated putting green

food_and_drink.notes: Available at Chef's Bar & Grill at Tim Hortons Iceplex
Available at Chef's Bar & Grill at Tim Hortons Iceplex

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs. The facility also offers club fittings with Mizuno, Cleveland, and Srixon brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has Chef's Bar & Grill at Tim Hortons Iceplex available for food and drinks. BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes is not specified, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a comfortable lounge atmosphere suitable for all ages.
